# Mazaleth's Gift

## Description

Gain 1 Ritual.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Boss/elite scaling potion; prefer when the fight will last long enough for Ritual Strength to outvalue immediate attack, block, or healing potions.
